{{Item
| name = 
| image = Throw stick.png
| id = throw_stick
| type = Throwables
| stackable = 1
}}

'''Throw Stick''' is a throwable item that lets you play and interact with your doggo!

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Stick <br>+ Slime Ball
|[[File:Throw stick crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
<blockquote>Make sure your dog is in [[Basic Core Stats#Modes|DOCILE mode]], '''<code>Right click</code>''' in the distance to throw it, and watch as the dog fetches it and brings it back to you!
* It will be covered in dog drool [[File:Throw stick wet.png]], so you'll have to '''<code>Right click</code>''' to wipe it off before you can throw it again. <ref>https://doggytalents.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Items_and_Equipment</ref>
</blockquote>

== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
* It functions identically to the [[Throw Bone]].

<references />
